001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.LayoutInflater;
005import android.view.View;
006import android.view.ViewGroup;
007import android.widget.EditText;
008import android.widget.Toast;
009import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
010import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
011import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat;
012import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat;
013import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsControllerCompat;
014import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
015import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelProvider;
016import androidx.recyclerview.widget.LinearLayoutManager;
017import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.DialogBulkCandlingBinding;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.EggGroup;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.viewmodel.BatchViewModel;
022import java.util.ArrayList;
023import java.util.List;
024import java.util.Map;
025
026@AndroidEntryPoint
027public class BulkCandlingDialogFragment extends DialogFragment {
028
029  private DialogBulkCandlingBinding binding;
030  private BatchViewModel batchViewModel;
031  private BulkCandlingGroupAdapter adapter;
032  private long batchId;
033
034  public static BulkCandlingDialogFragment newInstance(long batchId) {
035    BulkCandlingDialogFragment fragment = new BulkCandlingDialogFragment();
036    Bundle args = new Bundle();
037    args.putLong("batchId", batchId);
038    fragment.setArguments(args);
039    return fragment;
040  }
041
042  @Nullable
043  @Override
044  public View onCreateView(
045      @NonNull LayoutInflater inflater,
046      @Nullable ViewGroup container,
047      @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState
048  ) {
049    binding = DialogBulkCandlingBinding.inflate(inflater, container, false);
050    return binding.getRoot();
051  }
052
053  @Override
054  public void onViewCreated(@NonNull View view, @Nullable Bundle savedInstanceState) {
055    super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState);
056
057    batchViewModel = new ViewModelProvider(requireActivity()).get(BatchViewModel.class);
058    batchId = requireArguments().getLong("batchId");
059
060    adapter = new BulkCandlingGroupAdapter(this::focusAndShowKeyboard);
061    binding.groupList.setLayoutManager(new LinearLayoutManager(requireContext()));
062    binding.groupList.setAdapter(adapter);
063    
064    batchViewModel.getSelectedBatchWithGroups().observe(getViewLifecycleOwner(), batchWithGroups -> {
065      List<EggGroup> groups = (batchWithGroups != null && batchWithGroups.getGroups() != null)
066          ? batchWithGroups.getGroups()
067          : new ArrayList<>();
068      adapter.submitList(groups);
069      binding.emptyMessage.setVisibility(groups.isEmpty() ? View.VISIBLE : View.GONE);
070    });
071
072    binding.cancelButton.setOnClickListener(v -> dismiss());
073
074    binding.saveButton.setOnClickListener(v -> {
075      if (!adapter.validateInputs()) {
076        Toast.makeText(
077            requireContext(),
078            R.string.message_bulk_candling_invalid_input,
079            Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
080        ).show();
081        return;
082      }
083
084      if (!adapter.hasAnyEnteredValue()) {
085        dismiss();
086        return;
087      }
088
089      Map<Long, Integer> viableCountsByGroupId = adapter.collectValidCounts();
090
091      binding.progressBar.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
092      binding.saveButton.setEnabled(false);
093      binding.cancelButton.setEnabled(false);
094
095      batchViewModel.applyBulkCandling(viableCountsByGroupId)
096          .whenComplete((result, throwable) -> requireActivity().runOnUiThread(() -> {
097            binding.progressBar.setVisibility(View.GONE);
098            binding.saveButton.setEnabled(true);
099            binding.cancelButton.setEnabled(true);
100
101            if (throwable == null) {
102              Toast.makeText(
103                  requireContext(),
104                  R.string.message_bulk_candling_saved,
105                  Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
106              ).show();
107              dismiss();
108            } else {
109              Toast.makeText(
110                  requireContext(),
111                  R.string.message_bulk_candling_save_failed,
112                  Toast.LENGTH_SHORT
113              ).show();
114            }
115          }));
116    });
117  }
118
119  @Override
120  public void onStart() {
121    super.onStart();
122    if (getDialog() != null && getDialog().getWindow() != null) {
123      getDialog().getWindow().setLayout(
124          ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
125          ViewGroup.LayoutParams.WRAP_CONTENT
126      );
127    }
128  }
129
130  private void focusAndShowKeyboard(@NonNull EditText editText) {
131    editText.requestFocus();
132    editText.post(() -> {
133      WindowInsetsControllerCompat controller =
134          ViewCompat.getWindowInsetsController(editText);
135      if (controller != null) {
136        controller.show(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.ime());
137      }
138    });
139  }
140
141  @Override
142  public void onDestroyView() {
143    binding = null;
144    super.onDestroyView();
145  }
146}
